worlds.name: Eldoria
worlds.description: A sprawling continent composed of magical ley-lines, currently at the brink of a massive geopolitical war.

countries.name: The Thayrian Empire
countries.description: A magocracy ruled by the council of seven arch-mages. Law is enforced via arcane automatons.

countries.name: The Iron Wastes
countries.description: Desolate landscapes populated by scavenger clans and hidden forge-fortresses.

cities.name: Oakhaven
cities.description: A bustling metropolitan port on the inner sea of Thayria.

pois.name: The Rusty Anchor Tavern
pois.description: A lively dockside tavern preferred by smugglers and retired adventurers.

npcs.name: Garrick 'One-Eye' Vance
npcs.description: Gruff barkeep missing his left eye. Secretly an informant for the Thieve's Guild.

inventoryItems.name: Rotgut Whiskey
inventoryItems.description: A harsh, unnamed spirit poured from an unlabeled clay jug. Warms the belly and clouds the memory.

inventoryItems.name: Smuggler's Map (Partial)
inventoryItems.description: A water-stained scrap of vellum showing tunnels beneath the docks. One section has been deliberately torn away.

inventoryItems.name: Dockworker's Supper
inventoryItems.description: A bowl of thick stew, hard bread, and a wedge of sharp cheese. Humble but filling.
